title: Advice of rights at appearance to answer petition
doc_html:
Art. 758.  Advice of rights at appearance to answer petition

If an appearance to answer the petition is required, the court shall advise the child and the child's caretaker of their rights pursuant to Article 740, unless they were so advised at a previous hearing.

Acts 1991, No. 235, §7.

Art. 758.  Advice of rights at appearance to answer petition

Acts 1991, No. 235, §7.
